title: MakeMyTrip Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: MakeMyTrip Hotels is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, MakeMyTrip Hotels in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MakeMyTrip Hotels:
MakeMyTrip Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Hotels!
